subject: Re:
body: WASHINGTON – Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro is deriding President Donald Trump as foolish for trying to oust him. Kim Jong Un is testing Trump's “love” – and his resolve – in the North Korea negotiations. And Iran's leaders are finding new ways to threaten the U.S. and to defy the president's “maximum pressure” campaign.
body_html: WASHINGTON – Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro is deriding President Donald Trump as foolish for trying to oust him. Kim Jong Un is testing Trump's “love” – and his resolve – in the North Korea negotiations. And Iran's leaders are finding new ways to threaten the U.S. and to defy the president's “maximum pressure” campaign.
